title: Whole genome de-novo assembly and annotation protocol for Apostichopus japonicus genome
author: Jihoon Jo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gmabu2e

steps.title: Run Trimmomatic and "Trim Galore" with...
steps.instruction: Run Trimmomatic and "Trim Galore" with input files of all Illumina raw-reads.

steps.title: Run ALLPATHS-LG for correcing errors in the raw illumina sequences
steps.instruction: Run ALLPATHS-LG for correcing errors in the raw illumina sequences

steps.title: Run Platanus for de-novo genome assembly...
steps.instruction: Run Platanus for de-novo genome assembly You should compare the performance of assemblers such as SOAPdenovo, ALLPATHS-LG

steps.title: Run GapCloser (a module of SOAPdenovo2)...
steps.instruction: Run GapCloser (a module of SOAPdenovo2) for gap closing of the gaps that still remained in the resulting scaffolds

steps.title: Run RepeatMasker using the Repbase TE...
steps.instruction: Run RepeatMasker using the Repbase TE library and de novo repeat library constructed by Repeat Modeler

steps.title: Perform the ab-initio gene prediction using...
steps.instruction: Perform the ab-initio gene prediction using AUGUSTUS using hints from splicing alignment of transcripts to the repeat-masked assembled genome with BLAT and PASA. You must collect the RNA-seq data for obtaing AUGUSTUS training set

steps.title: Map the homologous proteins in other...
steps.instruction: Map the homologous proteins in other species (from Unoprot) to the repeat-masked assembled genome using tBLASTn with an E-value < 1 x 10 -5

steps.title: Predict the gene in the aligned...
steps.instruction: Predict the gene in the aligned sequences in Step9 using GeneWise to search for precise spliced alignment and gene structure.

steps.title: Map RNA-seq reads to the repeat-masked...
steps.instruction: Map RNA-seq reads to the repeat-masked assembled genome using TopHat, and build the homology-based gene model using Cufflinks.

steps.title: Intergrate all gene set in Step...
steps.instruction: Intergrate all gene set in Step 8-11 without redundant gene set.
